data.title: SEC delays decisions on staking and in-kind redemptions for crypto ETFs to early June
data.description:
The US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has delayed decisions on two proposed amendments related to crypto exchange-traded funds (ETFs), extending review periods for both staking and in-kind redemption models into June 2025. The new timelines apply to Grayscale’s Ethereum (ETH) staking filing and VanEck filings for in-kind redemptions on Bitcoin (BTC) and Ether ETFs.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/sec-delays-decisions-on-staking-and-in-kind-redemptions-for-crypto-etfs-to-early-june/

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Says Rise of AI Means Need for Crypto Privacy Can No Longer Be Ignored – Here’s Why
data.description:
The founder of the leading smart contract platform Ethereum (ETH), is making the case for crypto privacy in the face of artificial intelligence (AI). In a new blog post, Vitalik Buterin says that as AI bots get better and better at scraping data, so does the need for privacy.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/14/vitalik-buterin-says-rise-of-ai-means-need-for-crypto-privacy-can-no-longer-be-ignored-heres-why/

data.title: Ethereum Price Eyes Breakout As Technical Signals Flash Major Gains
data.description:
Ethereum (ETH) price shows rising strength by creating a symmetrical triangle on its hourly chart. Based on this formation the price will likely move by 17% soon. ETH stays above its multi-year defense line as it keeps breaking higher in its bigger market structure
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/14/ethereum-price-eyes-breakout-as-technical-signals-flash-major-gains/

data.title: Trade wars could spur governments to embrace Web3 — Truebit
data.description:
Escalating trade wars are rattling cryptocurrency markets — but they are also creating new use cases for blockchain networks, Truebit executives told Cointelegraph.  On April 2, President Donald Trump announced plans to charge sweeping tariffs on US imports, prompting other nations to threaten retaliatory measures. Trump later paused the tariff rollout for certain countries — but the possibility of a global trade war still looms, especially after Trump reiterated his commitment to taxing Chinese goods. If high tariffs materialize, blockchain technology can play an important role in ensuring governments apply them fairly, according to the executives
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/trade-wars-could-spur-governments-embrace-web3-truebit?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Tether commits hash rate to OCEAN Mining, extending mining operations on Africa
data.description:
Tether announced on April 14 that it will begin deploying current and future Bitcoin (BTC) mining hashrate on OCEAN Mining as part of its African strategy. The decision marks a shift in the company’s operational mining infrastructure toward software that permits miners to construct block templates independently without reliance on centralized intermediaries.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/tether-commits-hash-rate-to-ocean-mining-extending-mining-operations-on-africa/

data.title: South Korea blocks 14 crypto exchanges on Apple Store — Report
data.description:
South Korea is expanding a ban on digital asset firms’ applications servicing its citizens. On April 11, the country’s Financial Services Commission (FSC) announced that 14 crypto exchanges were blocked on the Apple store. Among the affected exchanges are KuCoin and MEXC. The report, which was made public on April 14, says the banned exchanges were allegedly operating as unregistered overseas virtual asset operators
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/south-korea-blocked-14-crypto-exchange-apple-apps-report?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
